title: Promote current build to live (Version 28)

requirements.text: Deploy the current version of the application (with the compacted punch in/out layout in ReportForm) to production.
acceptanceCriteria: The live environment reflects the compacted punch in/out date and time side-by-side layout in ReportForm.
The PDF generator renders punch in/out date and time on single lines as expected.
All previously working features remain functional in the live deployment.

nonGoals: No new features or UI changes in this deployment.
